feed.title: Programming With Wolfgang
feed.subtitle: A tech blog focusing on DevOps, Cloud, Azure, Kubernetes and Software Architecture.

entry.title: Video - My Journey to Microsoft MVP - The Highs, the Lows, and the Lessons

link.title: Video - My Journey to Microsoft MVP - The Highs, the Lows, and the Lessons

entry.title: My Journey to Microsoft MVP - The Highs, the Lows, and the Lessons

link.title: My Journey to Microsoft MVP - The Highs, the Lows, and the Lessons

entry.summary: Becoming a Microsoft MVP (Most Valuable Professional) is a goal for many in the technical community. It represents a bridge between professional expertise and community advocacy. Recently, I was honored to receive this award for my work with Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). However, the road to getting that trophy wasn’t a straight line. It involved a high-volume content schedule, a very painful...

entry.title: Video - How to Secure Azure Container Registry Repositories with ABAC

link.title: Video - How to Secure Azure Container Registry Repositories with ABAC

entry.title: How to Secure Azure Container Registry Repositories with ABAC

link.title: How to Secure Azure Container Registry Repositories with ABAC

entry.summary: In modern cloud-native environments, sharing a single Azure Container Registry (ACR) across multiple software teams is a common practice to reduce costs and centralize management. However, this often presents a significant security challenge: how do you ensure that Team A cannot see or pull images belonging to Team B? Standard Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) often leads to “all-or-nothing” pe...
